name: I already have content. Why would I add FAQ schema for AEO?
description: Because it can answer the objections people still have after reading your main page. It helps when the page needs clarity, not just more content.

mainEntity.name: I already have content. Why would I add FAQ schema for AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: If your site already gets clicks but not enough qualified leads, the FAQ should target objections and decision questions. If people are still confused about what you do, the FAQ should focus on scope, process, and outcomes first. The right content depends on the gap in your funnel.
acceptedAnswer.description: Because it can answer the objections people still have after reading your main page. It helps when the page needs clarity, not just more content.
